result.stdout:
Description:
  dotnet-exec, execute raw C# script/program from the command line

Usage:
  dotnet-exec [<script>...] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <script>  CSharp script to execute, start repl when no script provided

Options:
  -f, --framework <net10.0>                               Target framework [default: net10.0]
  --startup-type <startup-type>                           The startup type to use for finding the correct entry
  -e, --entry <e>                                         Custom entry point('MainTest' by default)
  --default-entry <default-entry>                         Default entry method names
  --compiler, --compiler-type <project|simple|workspace>  The compiler to use [default: workspace]
  --executor, --executor-type <default>                   The executor to use [default: default]
  --preview                                               Use preview language feature and enable preview features
  -c, --configuration <Debug|Release>                     Compile Configuration/OptimizationLevel
  --args, --arguments <args>                              Input arguments, this is obsolete, please use ` -- <args[0]> <args[1]>` instead
  --ref-compile                                           Use Ref assemblies for compile, when not found from local download from nuget
  --project <project>                                     The project file path to exact references and usings
  --wide                                                  Includes widely-used references(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration/DependencyInjection/Logging,Newtonsoft.Json,WeihanLi.Common)
  -w, --web                                               Includes the ASP.NET Core Web SDK references
  -r, --reference <r>                                     Additional references
  -u, --using <u>                                         Configure the global namespace usings
  --ad, --addition <ad>                                   Additional script path
  --generator                                             Enable the source generator support
  --profile <profile>                                     The config profile to use
  --compile-symbol <compile-symbol>                       Preprocessor symbol names for parsing and compiling
  --compile-feature <compile-feature>                     Features for parsing and compiling
  --dry-run                                               Dry-run, would not execute script and output debug info
  --nuget-config <nuget-config>                           NuGet config file path to use
  --env <env>                                             Set environment variable for process, usage example: --env name=test --env value=123
  --compile-out <compile-out>                             Compiled dll output path
  --debug                                                 Enable debug logs for debug
  --info                                                  Inspect tool version and runtime info
  --timeout <timeout>                                     Timeout in seconds for the execution
  -?, -h, --help                                          Show help and usage information
  --version                                               Show version information

Commands:
  profile           Configure user config profile
  alias             Alias management
  test <testFiles>  Execute xunit test cases

commands.payload:
Description:
  dotnet-exec, execute raw C# script/program from the command line

Usage:
  dotnet-exec [<script>...] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <script>  CSharp script to execute, start repl when no script provided

Options:
  -f, --framework <net10.0>                               Target framework [default: net10.0]
  --startup-type <startup-type>                           The startup type to use for finding the correct entry
  -e, --entry <e>                                         Custom entry point('MainTest' by default)
  --default-entry <default-entry>                         Default entry method names
  --compiler, --compiler-type <project|simple|workspace>  The compiler to use [default: workspace]
  --executor, --executor-type <default>                   The executor to use [default: default]
  --preview                                               Use preview language feature and enable preview features
  -c, --configuration <Debug|Release>                     Compile Configuration/OptimizationLevel
  --args, --arguments <args>                              Input arguments, this is obsolete, please use ` -- <args[0]> <args[1]>` instead
  --ref-compile                                           Use Ref assemblies for compile, when not found from local download from nuget
  --project <project>                                     The project file path to exact references and usings
  --wide                                                  Includes widely-used references(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration/DependencyInjection/Logging,Newtonsoft.Json,WeihanLi.Common)
  -w, --web                                               Includes the ASP.NET Core Web SDK references
  -r, --reference <r>                                     Additional references
  -u, --using <u>                                         Configure the global namespace usings
  --ad, --addition <ad>                                   Additional script path
  --generator                                             Enable the source generator support
  --profile <profile>                                     The config profile to use
  --compile-symbol <compile-symbol>                       Preprocessor symbol names for parsing and compiling
  --compile-feature <compile-feature>                     Features for parsing and compiling
  --dry-run                                               Dry-run, would not execute script and output debug info
  --nuget-config <nuget-config>                           NuGet config file path to use
  --env <env>                                             Set environment variable for process, usage example: --env name=test --env value=123
  --compile-out <compile-out>                             Compiled dll output path
  --debug                                                 Enable debug logs for debug
  --info                                                  Inspect tool version and runtime info
  --timeout <timeout>                                     Timeout in seconds for the execution
  -?, -h, --help                                          Show help and usage information
  --version                                               Show version information

Commands:
  profile           Configure user config profile
  alias             Alias management
  test <testFiles>  Execute xunit test cases

result.stdout:
Description:
  Alias management

Usage:
  dotnet-exec [<script>...] alias [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <script>  CSharp script to execute, start repl when no script provided

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list, ls                      List all alias config
  set <aliasName> <aliasValue>  Set alias config
  rm, unset <aliasName>         Unset alias config
  reset                         Reset alias config

result.stdout:
Description:
  Configure user config profile

Usage:
  dotnet-exec [<script>...] profile [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <script>  CSharp script to execute, start repl when no script provided

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  set <profile-name>  Configure config profile
  get <profile-name>  Get config profile
  rm <profile-name>   Remove config profile
  ls                  List the config profiles configured

result.stdout:
Description:
  Execute xunit test cases

Usage:
  dotnet-exec [<script>...] test <testFiles>... [options]

Arguments:
  <script>     CSharp script to execute, start repl when no script provided
  <testFiles>  The xunit test files to test

Options:
  -u, --using <u>      Configure the global namespace usings
  -r, --reference <r>  Additional references
  -w, --web            Includes the ASP.NET Core Web SDK references
  --preview            Use preview language feature and enable preview features
  --debug              Enable debug logs for debug
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
